notes: 0.2.0 — Reliability + workers + bulk actions + charts. Auto-reconnect with exponential backoff, sentinel failover detection, stalled-job banner, cluster cross-slot pipeline split. Workers tab via CLIENT LIST. Bulk select with shift/cmd click + Retry all / Promote all / Remove all. Metrics tab with stacked area + throughput + stalled charts via Swift Charts; inline throughput sparkline in queue header. Cron-parser-backed scheduler detail with next 5 fires. Add Job dialog (BullMQ-shape insert with delay/priority/attempts). Settings pane (poll intervals, theme override, page size). Full keyboard shortcuts. Universal binary (arm64+x86_64). CI on PRs.
